message:
Command `
# Check librelane / openlane availability
echo "=== librelane ==="
which librelane 2>/dev/null || echo "not found"
librelane --version 2>/dev/null || echo "librelane --version failed"

echo ""
echo "=== openlane ==="
which openlane 2>/dev/null || echo "not found"
openlane --version 2>/dev/null || echo "openlane --version failed"

echo ""
echo "=== python openlane ==="
python3 -m openlane --version 2>/dev/null || echo "python3 -m openlane failed"

echo ""
echo "=== conda / venv ==="
conda activate base 2>/dev/null; python3 -m openlane --version 2>/dev/null || true
` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "
# Check librelane / openlane availability
echo "=== librelane ==="
which librelane 2>/dev/null || echo "not found"
librelane --version 2>/dev/null || echo "librelane --version failed"

echo ""
echo "=== openlane ==="
which openlane 2>/dev/null || echo "not found"
openlane --version 2>/dev/null || echo "openlane --version failed"

echo ""
echo "=== python openlane ==="
python3 -m openlane --version 2>/dev/null || echo "python3 -m openlane failed"

echo ""
echo "=== conda / venv ==="
conda activate base 2>/dev/null; python3 -m openlane --version 2>/dev/null || true
"}
function.name: execute_bash

content:
=== librelane ===
/home/user/.nix-profile/bin/librelane

=== openlane ===
/usr/local/bin/openlane
LibreLane v3.0.2

Copyright ©2025-2026 LibreLane Contributors

Adapted from OpenLane 2.0
Copyright ©2020-2025 Efabless Corporation

Available under the Apache License, version 2. Included with the source code,
but you can also get a copy at https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0

Included tools and utilities may be distributed under stricter licenses.

=== python openlane ===
python3 -m openlane failed

=== conda / venv ===

extras.command:
# Check librelane / openlane availability
echo "=== librelane ==="
which librelane 2>/dev/null || echo "not found"
librelane --version 2>/dev/null || echo "librelane --version failed"

echo ""
echo "=== openlane ==="
which openlane 2>/dev/null || echo "not found"
openlane --version 2>/dev/null || echo "openlane --version failed"

echo ""
echo "=== python openlane ==="
python3 -m openlane --version 2>/dev/null || echo "python3 -m openlane failed"

echo ""
echo "=== conda / venv ==="
conda activate base 2>/dev/null; python3 -m openlane --version 2>/dev/null || true
